root_cause.text: The vulnerability exists because Apache Struts processes parameter names as OGNL expressions without adequate length restrictions, allowing an attacker to trigger excessive CPU consumption during expression evaluation.
root_cause.evidence: The CVE description explicitly states that the denial of service (CPU consumption) is caused "via a long parameter name, which is processed as an OGNL expression."

agent_logs.root_cause_candidate: The vulnerability exists because Apache Struts processes parameter names as OGNL expressions without adequate length restrictions, allowing an attacker to trigger excessive CPU consumption during expression evaluation.
agent_logs.evidence_points: The CVE description explicitly states that the denial of service (CPU consumption) is caused "via a long parameter name, which is processed as an OGNL expression."
